steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify organizer bar, shelf brackets, and wall screws.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify organizer bar, shelf brackets, and wall screws.

steps.title: Locate Wall Stud
steps.content: Find wall stud. Level organizer and screw directly through pre-drilled holes into stud.

es.title: Locate Wall Stud
es.content: Find wall stud. Level organizer and screw directly through pre-drilled holes into stud.

steps.title: Place Equipment
steps.content: Store trimmers, hedge trimmers, or power heads. Use securement rod to lock them in place.

es.title: Place Equipment
es.content: Store trimmers, hedge trimmers, or power heads. Use securement rod to lock them in place.
